privileged_info_summary: All 12 metadata claims are verified as correct and internally consistent. This is a synthetic task specification for creating a Magento configurable product: parent product 'Trailmaster Summit Backpack 45L' (SKU TMS-BP-45L, price $149.99, type configurable) with two child simple products (Black: TMS-BP-45L-BLK at $149.99 qty 30, Green: TMS-BP-45L-GRN at $159.99 qty 25), assigned to Sports category and configured by Color attribute. All values are consistent across task.json description, README.md, export_result.sh, and verifier.py. The green variant price ($159.99) intentionally differs from the parent and black variant prices ($149.99) to test variant-specific pricing capability. All metadata aligns with verifier scoring criteria (6 independent scoring criteria: parent existence, parent type, child SKUs, child linking, category assignment, and green variant price).
